narrative:
Pleasant Twp township has 722 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.3 percentage points.
